title: CARI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 10 Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 10 Senior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, BAMS, and MD/MS can apply for the CARI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selec...
